_comment: Schema for image versions 2026.1.x: MethodTypesConfiguration + models referenced by Name (no Id Guid). For 2026.2+ use aiconfiguration.json instead. To use this, copy it over aiconfiguration.json before deploy. NO Key Vault: with UseAzureKeyVault=false the ApiKey below is the LITERAL OpenAI key; deploy.ps1 injects your -OpenAiApiKey into the ApiKey placeholder and writes .work/aiconfiguration.json (git-ignored).

OpenAi.Description: OpenAI (api.openai.com). ApiKey is the real key because Key Vault is disabled in this sandbox.

ProviderModels.Name: OpenAI (sandbox)
ProviderModels.Description: Sandbox model. ModelName values are OpenAI model ids.
